CCR Improvement Loop — metrics & trends

Aggregates committed run-*.json files. Trends are read from data/; null means "not measured" and renders as a gap, never zero. Low-confidence values are flagged lc.

Loading…
Repos:

Miss rate over time

Lower is better. One line per repo.

Bug-fix PR rate over time

Lower is better. One line per repo.

Addressed rate by severity

Higher is better. One line per severity across the shown runs.

Bug-fix PR rate by repo (latest run)

Per-run headline metrics

n/a = not measured (null denominator). lc = low confidence (small sample).
